summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Realm of Aethoria medieval RPG landing page. All major features functional with 100% backend API success and 95% frontend functionality verified.

integration_issues.issue: Success toast/banner not clearly visible after registration form submission
Modal overlay intercepts clicks on navbar buttons when another modal is open

issues: Modal dialog accessibility warnings - missing description/aria-describedby

passed_tests: All 12 backend API endpoints return correct status codes and data structure
Landing page loads without console errors
Event ticker displays scrolling medieval events at top
Hero section shows correct title and CTA buttons ('Join the Realm', 'Enter the Gate')
Features section displays 42 features in paginated grid with working pagination
Hall of Legends leaderboard shows 10 adventurers with rank/name/title/age/level/growth
Testimonials section shows reviews with star ratings
Paths section has 3 working tab buttons (Knight/Shadow/Noble) with different content
Royal Chronicles news section with featured chronicle and news list
Login modal opens when clicking hero/navbar login buttons
Register modal opens when clicking hero/navbar join buttons
Footer section displays with appropriate content
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (12/12 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (major functionality working)
